name: 13q14_RB1_paralog_region
description: Retinoblastoma RB1 region at 13q14.2 contains pseudogene RB1P (RBL2-like) and small intra-chromosomal SDs flanking the RB1 tumour-suppressor that mediate recurrent intragenic and contiguous deletions causing retinoblastoma and the 13q14 deletion syndrome (13q-syndrome).

architecture.internal_structure: Multiple LCR pairs of 1-10 kb at 90-99% identity flanking RB1 introns 17, 19, 24; AluY/AluSx pairs predispose to ~5-100 kb intragenic NAHR deletions.
